comment.body:
1) if you don't understand something, and you feel frustrated about it, and you get an answer, take your time to digest it. 
There is no some 'magic line', 'magic phrase' that when you hear, you will be enlightened and everything becomes clear.
You have to take your time and effort to think through these complex dynamics.
There is no shortcuts.

comment.body:
Learn to ask the good/actually relevant questions,
but first - as said in the welcome email too - make sure you don't find your answer in any of my posts.. and that its not only bcs you were lazy to think about something.

And the other part: if you can't stay patient, don't hit the keyboard. I don't have the capacity to go one by one on 580 members on different lvls of knowledge. You can either help individually or not. 
Both parties must take efforts.
